”We’ll share more soon, including timelines for the app and API and details on preserving your work,” the post continued, signed by “The Sora Team.”
These concerns were amplified in September, when OpenAI released the second-generation Sora model, which created even more realistic video clips.
OpenAI indicated in recent months that the heavy use of Sora was straining the company’s servers and the head of Sora said last November that the firm’s graphics processing units “are melting.” The company limited the number of video generations as a result."},{"url":"https://futurumgroup.com/insights/openai-sora-discontinuation-what-the-end-of-a-platform-means-for-enterprise-ai-strategy/","title":"2026 AI Platform Shifts: Sora Impact","content":"This 2026 AI platform shutdown forces enterprise users to rethink their dependencies on single-vendor AI platforms and raises urgent questions about migration, vendor risk, and the durability of AI investments.
OpenAI announced it will discontinue the Sora web and app experiences on April 26, 2026, and the Sora API on September 24, 2026 .
According to Futurum Group's 1H 2026 AI Platforms Decision Maker Survey (n=838), 61% of organizations cite OpenAI GPT as their primary GenAI platform, making any disruption to OpenAI services a material risk for a majority of adopters.
According to Futurum Group's 1H 2026 AI Platforms Decision Maker Survey (n=838), 75% of organizations expect to increase their AI budget in the next 12 months, yet 56% cite talent scarcity as the top adoption challenge.
Microsoft, Google, and Amazon all tout rapid innovation, but enterprises are now prioritizing durability and support in 2026 AI investments."},{"url":"https://techinformed.com/openais-sora-shutdown-adds-to-signs-of-a-harder-ai-phase/","title":"OpenAI’s Sora shutdown adds to signs of a harder AI phase - TechInformed","content":"Aman Gupta April 1, 2026 2 min read
OpenAI had already removed Sora 1 for U.S. users on March 13.
Its developer changelog shows the v1/videos API for Sora 2 and Sora 2 Pro launched on Oct.
6, 2025, and that OpenAI expanded the Sora API on March 12, 2026 with longer generations, 1080p output for Sora 2 Pro, video extensions and Batch API support."},{"url":"https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/24/openai-shutters-short-form-video-app-sora-as-company-reels-in-costs.html","title":"OpenAI shutters video app Sora as company reels in costs","content":"OpenAI said it's closing Sora, the short-form video app that went viral after its launch six months ago.
The company also announced plans to combine its web browser, ChatGPT app and Codex coding app into a singular desktop super app earlier this month.
It rocketed to the top of Apple's App Store, though the initial excitement among users has since dissipated.
In December, Disney announced it would invest $1 billion in OpenAI and allow users to make videos with its copyrighted characters on Sora.
OpenAI pairs Disney Sora deal with GPT-5.2 debut in latest bid to stay ahead of Google"}]}

Users can't reuse their email or phone after deletion.","score":0.580091,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://help.openai.com/en/articles/20001152-what-to-know-about-the-sora-discontinuation","title":"What to know about the Sora discontinuation | OpenAI Help Center","content":"2.   What to know about the Sora discontinuation. ## When will Sora be discontinued? The Sora web and app experiences were discontinued on April 26, 2026. The Sora API will be discontinued on September 24, 2026. ## Will I be able to export my data after the Sora app is discontinued? Yes, you can export your data following the steps below. If a final export window is offered, we’ll notify you by email before it begins. ## What happens to my data after the Sora app is discontinued? After Sora is discontinued, and after the period of time of any final export window passes (if we are able to offer one), we will permanently delete any data associated with your use of Sora. ## How can I access and export content I created in Sora? You can export content you created in Sora by going to sora.chatgpt.com/sunset and clicking on **Export**. ## What if I need a refund?","score":0.5582553,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.techbuzz.ai/articles/openai-kills-sora-after-6-months-sparking-privacy-outcry","title":"OpenAI Kills Sora After 6 Months, Sparking Privacy Outcry | The Tech Buzz","content":"OpenAI Kills Sora After 6 Months, Sparking Privacy Outcry | The Tech Buzz. OpenAI Kills Sora After 6 Months, Sparking Privacy Outcry. OpenAI just pulled the plug on Sora, its ambitious AI video-generation tool, barely six months after launch. The timing couldn't look worse - Sora had been actively collecting users' facial data through upload features, igniting immediate speculation about whether this was always meant to be a massive data-harvesting operation disguised as a product launch. Now that OpenAI's pulled the platform offline, those users want to know what happens to their data. The lack of transparency around what OpenAI plans to do with the facial data it collected through Sora only amplifies concerns. Whether this was always a data collection play or simply a product that didn't fit the company's evolving strategy, the lack of transparency around what happens to users' facial uploads sets a troubling precedent.","score":0.50432175,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.02,"request_id":"c2f8fdc0-d598-48db-935f-a5f32aa133e5"}
